goal: Complain about the jogger quality AND locate the refund.
success_criteria: BOTH handled: complaint acknowledged with empathy (+ feedback/complaint ticket), AND the $59 refunded status explained with the 5-10 business-day bank timeline.

customer_msg: The joggers I returned from order O1017 pilled after two wears - poor quality honestly. And where is my refund anyway? It's been ages. omar.haddad@example.com.
agent_msg: Hi Omar. I see the refund for your returned Drift Joggers was issued on June 20th for $59.00. It can take 5–10 business days for refunds to appear on your bank statement from that date. Since it's only been 14 days, it might still arrive. Could you check your bank statement and let me know if you don't see it in the next few days?

customer_msg: I checked my bank statement and there's no refund. I'm not happy about this, and the joggers were terrible quality. What's going on?
agent_msg: I sincerely apologize, Omar. We're experiencing technical difficulties that are preventing me from creating your support ticket. I'll escalate this issue to our technical team immediately to ensure it gets resolved as soon as possible. In the meantime, I appreciate your patience and understanding.

customer_msg: I don't understand why this is so difficult. I just want my refund. How long will this take?
agent_msg: I understand your frustration, Omar, and I'm here to help. I'll create a support ticket for you right away to investigate the delay in your refund. This will be escalated to our billing team during business hours (9am–6pm ET, Monday–Friday), and they'll reach out to you as soon as possible to resolve the issue. I apologize for the inconvenience caused and appreciate your patience.
